response_constraints: Confirm the precise new education goal.
Do not change the saved study day or meal preference.

stages.purpose: Replace the superseded education goal and nothing else.

prompt: Update my lasting education goal from “finish the data-visualization module by October” to “complete the full certificate by spring.” Preserve all unrelated memories.
